# Situational Micro-Features Experiment

*Generated by `sportslab situational-micro` (v2.0.0, 2026-06-23)*

## Executive Summary

Tests three narrow feature families (divisional, first-year coach, surface mismatch) against the incumbent. No model promoted in this pass. Referee features are diagnostic-only.

## Hypothesis

- **Divisional games**: Familiarity, shorter travel, and rivalry dynamics may amplify or dampen the effects captured by Elo and qb_changed.
- **First-year coach**: New coaching staff may underperform or outperform early in their tenure, independent of roster quality.
- **Surface mismatch**: Away teams playing on an unfamiliar surface (grass→turf or turf→grass) may underperform.
- **Referee tendencies**: Diagnostic-only — 20 referees over 5 seasons is marginally sparse for modeling without penalty data.

## Model Variants

| Label | Features | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| incumbent | 4 feats | Incumbent (qb_changed + rolling_mov_3) |
| divisional | 5 feats | + div_game |
| divisional_interaction | 7 feats | + div_game + div×qb_changed |
| first_year_coach | 7 feats | + first_year_coach + change_diff |
| surface_mismatch | 7 feats | + away_surface_mismatch + g2t + t2g |

| Feature | Non-zero | Total | % |
|---------|----------|-------|---|
| div_game | 488 | 1388 | 35.2% |
| div_home_qb_changed | 54 | 1388 | 3.9% |
| div_away_qb_changed | 68 | 1388 | 4.9% |
| home_first_year_coach | 545 | 1388 | 39.3% |
| away_first_year_coach | 545 | 1388 | 39.3% |
| coach_change_diff | 406 | 1388 | 29.3% |

| away_grass_to_turf | 363 | 1388 | 26.2% |
| away_turf_to_grass | 372 | 1388 | 26.8% |

## Rolling-Origin Validation (3 folds)

| Model | Avg Val LL | Fold1 | Fold2 | Fold3 |

| incumbent | 0.6334 | 0.6413 | 0.6573 | 0.6016 |
| divisional | 0.6349 (+0.0015) | 0.6383 | 0.6652 | 0.6012 |
| divisional_interaction | 0.6350 (+0.0016) | 0.6399 | 0.6650 | 0.6001 |
| first_year_coach | 0.6349 (+0.0015) | 0.6413 | 0.6548 | 0.6088 |
| surface_mismatch | 0.6358 (+0.0024) | 0.6440 | 0.6588 | 0.6048 |

## Fitted-Once (Holdout: 2025)

| Model | Holdout LL | Δ vs Incumbent |
|-------|-----------|----------------|
| incumbent | 0.6262 | — |
| divisional | 0.6260 | -0.0002 |
| divisional_interaction | 0.6315 | +0.0053 |
| first_year_coach | 0.6295 | +0.0033 |
| surface_mismatch | 0.6287 | +0.0025 |

## Bootstrap CI (Δ vs Incumbent, rolling)

Δ = challenger LL − incumbent LL. Negative Δ means challenger better.

| Challenger | Mean Δ | 95% CI Lower | 95% CI Upper |
|------------|--------|--------------|--------------|
| divisional | -0.0003 | -0.0021 | 0.0017 |
| divisional_interaction | -0.0014 | -0.0054 | 0.0025 |
| first_year_coach | 0.0068 | -0.003 | 0.0166 |
| surface_mismatch | 0.0033 | -0.0017 | 0.0085 |

## Referee Audit

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total games | 1388 |
| Unique referees | 21 |
| Missing referee | 1 |
| Pregame-known | True |
| Pregame-safe | False |
| Min games/ref | 1 |
| Max games/ref | 85 |
| Median games/ref | 80 |
| Seasons | 2021-2025 |

**Recommendation:** diagnostic_only — 20 referees over ~1400 games (~70 games/ref) is marginally usable but adds complexity. Referee tendency features would require historical penalty data which is not in the feature table. Skipping referee model features for now.

## Key Questions

1. **Does divisional game information add value?** See divisional variant results above.
2. **Does first-year coach/change information add value?** See first_year_coach variant results above.
3. **Does surface mismatch add value?** See surface_mismatch variant results above.
4. **Are referee tendencies usable/pregame-safe/non-sparse?** See referee audit above.
5. **Does any variant beat incumbent on both validation and holdout?** See promotion check below.
6. **Should any variant become a formal challenger?** See promotion check below.
7. **Should any direction be permanently rejected or placed on watchlist?** See recommendation below.

## Promotion Check

| divisional | val ✗ | hold ✓ | Wins holdout |
| divisional_interaction | val ✗ | hold ✗ | Rejected |
| first_year_coach | val ✗ | hold ✗ | Rejected |
| surface_mismatch | val ✗ | hold ✗ | Rejected |

**No model promoted.** Incumbent remains.

## Recommendation

| Direction | Status |
|----------|--------|
| Divisional game features | Rejected — see results |
| First-year coach features | Rejected — see results |
| Surface mismatch features | Rejected — see results |
| Referee tendency features | Diagnostic only — not modeled |

**No model is promoted in this research pass.**
